summary: First iteration end-to-end tests for String Creations 03 (backend + frontend). Backend: 17/17 pytest passing (root, admin verify, settings GET/PUT + auth guard, products CRUD + auth guards + 404 paths). Frontend: landing empty state, hero logo, marquee, about-string-art, process, commissions cards, contact section (WA/email/location/hours), floating WhatsApp bubble, all WA CTAs use wa.me/<whatsapp>. Admin flow: invalid token toast, valid login, product create/edit/delete via UI, settings whatsapp update propagates immediately to landing floating WA + hero CTA + contact links, ProductDialog opens from a product card with WhatsApp CTA prefilled. No critical or minor bugs found.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: uses deprecated FastAPI '@app.on_event("shutdown")' (works but Starlette recommends lifespan) — non-blocking.
server.py get_settings PUT does not validate whatsapp digits — a non-numeric whatsapp would produce broken wa.me URLs. Consider adding a simple digit-only Pydantic validator.
Admin auth is a shared secret sent in a custom header — fine for MVP but token is stored in localStorage which is vulnerable to XSS; ok for admin-only demo, worth noting.
Landing.jsx: images array from products is base64 data URLs stored in Mongo — large images may bloat the /api/products response. Consider size-limit or S3 in future.
No pagination on GET /api/products (hard-capped to 500). Fine for MVP.
test_credentials: Admin token: stringcreations03-admin (from backend/.env ADMIN_TOKEN, mirrored in /app/memory/test_credentials.md).
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up a temporary product 'TEST_UI_Portrait' via UI and 'TEST_Dialog_Piece' via API. All test data prefixed with TEST_ and removed after run. Settings whatsapp temporarily changed then restored to 919999999999.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL: https://fiber-art-market.preview.emergentagent.com. Admin token 'stringcreations03-admin' in X-Admin-Token header. All test data uses TEST_ prefix; cleanup fixture in backend_test.py removes anything starting with TEST_. All backend endpoints verified with data-persistence assertions (Create→GET, Update→GET, Delete→404). UI covered: landing sections, admin login/CRUD/settings, ProductDialog. No mocked APIs.
